REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., AND DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. OREGON, WASHINGTON, AND ARKANSAS AUTHORITIES CITED BY PLAINTIFF ARE NOT BINDING AND DO NOT ON POINT. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN THAT THERE IS A PROBLEM WITH THE CHAIN OF OWNERSHIP BASED ON AHMA NOT BEING A MERS MEMBER AND IN LIGHT OF THE CONTRACTUAL PROVISION. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS.) JUDGE: LYNN O'MALLEY TAYLOR, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2018 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Chaitra G. Betageri (415-398-3344) of Severson & Werson, APC for Defendants/Moving party MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., and DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY.
No other appearances.

Not Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., and DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Oregon, Washington, and Arkansas authorities cited by Plaintiff are not binding and do not on point. Plaintiff has not shown that there is a problem with the chain of ownership based on AHMA not being a MERS member and in light of the contractual provision. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
